items.title: Sync conflict silently drops notes when two devices edit offline
items.body: Repro: edit the same note on two devices while offline, reconnect both. One device's edits are gone with no conflict file. This has cost me real data twice.

items.title: Feature request: plain-markdown vault export without proprietary metadata
items.body: Export currently embeds app-specific front matter. A clean markdown export would make migration and backup workflows much easier.
